subject: use ODL aaa-app-config when AAF disabled
commit_message:
use ODL aaa-app-config when AAF disabled

picking up ODL default aaa-app-config.xml
file when AAF disabled.

Issue-ID: APPC-1855
Change-Id: Ic53156e3c24180a20c9b1be46d3d3a7824c468c9
Signed-off-by: Taka Cho <takamune.cho@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

not an ODL expert but patch seems good.

Although, can you explain a little bit the consequences in the commit message?
thanks!

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> not an ODL expert but patch seems good.
> 
> Although, can you explain a little bit the consequences in the commit message?
> thanks!

when AAF is on, the odl will be using org.onap.aaf.cadi.shiro.AAFRealm instead, 
AAF is off, should be picking up the default from ODL.
